D3 Chemistry L4 Analyze Reference

Cadmium Selenide CdSe — Quantum Dot Colour vs Size

bulk CdSe is dark red (Eg 1.74 eV); shrink to a 2-nm nanocrystal and Eg climbs to 2.7 eV — the same crystal glows green-to-orange across the visible just by changing size

CdSe quantum dots are the textbook example of size-tuned colour. Bulk Eg = 1.74 eV (dark red). Confine the exciton in a 2-nm crystal and the gap widens by ~1 eV (quantum confinement). The same composition fluoresces green at 2 nm, orange at 4 nm, red at 6 nm. Used in Quantum Dot TVs (Samsung QD-OLED), bio-imaging tags, solar cells.

Drag the dot size from 2 to 10 nm. The fluorescence colour sweeps green → yellow → orange → red.
